name: Mike Lowe at Rate (NMLS #174934)
description_short: Mike Lowe is a VP of Mortgage Lending at Guaranteed Rate in Seattle with 30+ years of experience offering home purchase, refinance, and specialty loan programs across all 50 states.
description_long:
Mike Lowe has been in the mortgage industry since 1994 and currently serves as VP of Mortgage Lending at Guaranteed Rate's Seattle, Washington office. With over 30 years of experience, he positions himself as a client-focused lender committed to education, communication, and execution throughout the mortgage process. His practice operates under NMLS #174934 and is licensed to operate in all 50 states, making his services geographically accessible to a broad range of borrowers.

Mike Lowe's service offerings span traditional and specialty mortgage products. These include conventional home purchase and refinance loans, FHA loans, VA loans (with 0% down options), USDA loans, jumbo loans for high-value properties, bank statement loans for self-employed borrowers, physician loans with 5% down options, foreign national loans without SSN requirements, reverse mortgages for seniors 62+, and down payment assistance programs. The practice also advertises accelerated approval timelines (same-day approvals with 3% down) and a "Lock 'N' Roll" rate lock program allowing 60-90 day rate locks before contract signing.

What distinguishes Mike Lowe's practice is his dual focus on both borrowers and real estate partners. He emphasizes proactive communication, deadline management, and relationship-building with agents. His office highlights speed and convenience features: 5-minute approvals from anywhere, same-day loan approvals, and quick funding timelines. The breadth of specialty programs (bank statement loans, physician loans, foreign national loans) suggests capacity to handle non-traditional borrower profiles. His personal background and hands-on approach to client relationships are positioned as differentiators in a competitive lending market.

However, important caveats exist. The website contains marketing language and promotional claims ("5 minute approvals," "stress-free") that are standard in the mortgage industry and not independently verified here. No information about rates, fees, closing costs, or pricing transparency is disclosed on the profile page. Customer reviews, complaint history, or third-party ratings are not available from this source. The profile emphasizes speed and ease but provides no concrete data on actual approval timelines, denial rates, or borrower satisfaction. Borrowers should request detailed Loan Estimate forms and compare terms across multiple lenders before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Licensed in all 50 states, providing geographic flexibility for borrowers nationwide
30+ years of industry experience with emphasis on education and transparent communication
Diverse specialty loan programs including bank statement loans for self-employed, physician loans, and foreign national loans
Fast approval options including same-day approvals and 5-minute initial approvals from anywhere
VA loan specialist with 0% down options for military service members and families
Dedicated relationship-building approach for real estate agent partners with proactive communication
Multiple down payment assistance options (VA, FHA, USDA, down payment grants) and low down payment programs
cons: No pricing transparency on website—rates, fees, and closing costs are not disclosed for rate comparison
Marketing claims ("5 minute approvals," "stress-free") are unverified and lack supporting data on actual timelines
No customer reviews, ratings, or complaint history available on profile to validate service quality claims
Limited detail on specific eligibility requirements, loan limits, or underwriting standards for specialty programs
Profile focuses on marketing benefits without substantive information on potential downsides, denial reasons, or borrower protections
best_for: Self-employed borrowers seeking bank statement loan programs without traditional income documentation
Military service members and veterans looking for VA loan options with 0% down payment requirements
Real estate agents seeking a reliable, communicative lender partner with proactive deal management
Borrowers needing fast pre-approval and approval timelines during competitive home-buying periods
diagnosis: Mike Lowe is best for borrowers seeking a geographically available mortgage lender with specialty program expertise (self-employed, military, physicians, foreign nationals) and appreciation for relationship-driven service. The main caveat is that promotional claims about speed and ease are not independently verified, and critical information about rates, fees, approval timelines, and underwriting standards are absent from the profile—requiring direct contact and detailed loan estimates before comparing offers.
services: Home purchase mortgages with conventional and specialty loan options
FHA loans with low down payment requirements
VA loans with 0% down options for military members
USDA loans for rural property financing
Jumbo loans for luxury and high-value properties
Bank statement loans for self-employed borrowers
Physician loans with 5% down options and paid mortgage insurance
Foreign national loans without SSN or FICO score requirements
Reverse mortgages for homeowners 62 and older
Down payment assistance programs with federal and local grants
Lock 'N' Roll rate lock program (60-90 day locks without signed contract)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 711 6th Ave N Suite 201 Offices 8 And 9, Seattle, WA 98109
